item.title: 01 - Example of Polling
item.description: Introduction Async is a widely used paradigm for multitasking. I say multitasking and not multithreading because there’s difference between async and multithreading. We will get to that later. Async is a cooperative multitasking paradigm that is very useful in cases of IO bound tasks. In case of CPU bound tasks, multithreading would be the better choice. Async runtimes exploit the underlying threadpool available from the operating system to run “tasks”.
